name: Shadowed Agent, Shadow
lines: Maintain comms security. Target not yet secured.
Too many variables. Contamination levels in this sector exceed projections.
Forget what you saw. It’s the only way you’ll stay alive.

friendly.greeting: An asset? Fine. If your survival aids the mission, I will provide support.
friendly.farewell: Keep our paths separate. If my position is compromised, you’re finished too.

normal.greeting: Civilian? This area is off-limits. Turn back immediately.
normal.farewell: Watch your mouth if you make it out. Information that isn't recorded doesn't exist.

hostile.greeting: Initiating witness elimination protocol. Security takes precedence over your life.
hostile.farewell: Your data is being purged. No one will ever find you.

deathLine: Mission... failed... Log transmitted to HQ... Immediate... disposal...
description: An agent dispatched by an unknown organization. Their objective is to recover biological samples and classified data from the depot.
encounter: Shadow: (Checking a suppressed firearm) The Resistance messing with that corpse wasn't an accident. Someone broke the seal on purpose.
Shadow: I've analyzed the attack patterns. They're more sensitive to bio-signatures than sound. Holding your breath won't save you.
Shadow: Mika's comms went dark. System synchronization was inevitable. I need to extract the data before her brain completely merges with the mainframe.
Shadow: Intel suggests command is considering burying this entire depot. We're out of time. Secure the samples and find an extraction point.
